Package nonprofitbookkeeping

package nonprofitbookkeeping
Coordinates the nonprofit bookkeeping application.

This root package defines top-level application wiring and startup entry points that connect the user interface, services, reporting, persistence, and plugin capabilities into one desktop-oriented bookkeeping system.

Responsibilities:

  • Bootstrap core runtime configuration.
  • Connect major architectural layers.
  • Provide application-level integration boundaries.
Since:
1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    nonprofitbookkeeping.api
    Defines the public integration API for nonprofit bookkeeping.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.core
    Implements core application orchestration.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
    Provides shared exception types and error semantics.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.model
    Contains core domain and transfer models.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
    Contains shared panel-level UI components.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence
    Implements persistence infrastructure for bookkeeping data.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.plugin
    Defines the plugin extension point contracts.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences
    Manages application preference models and utilities.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
    Coordinates report services and report-level abstractions.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.service
    Implements application service-layer use cases.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.tools
    Contains development and command-line tooling utilities.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
    Defines top-level user interface composition and wiring.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.util
    Supplies cross-cutting utility classes.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    TestDatabase
    Utility to initialize and reset the shared H2 database for tests.
